title: TrustForge Approval Request
description: A pending approval request raised by the daemon when a guarded action requires explicit human approval.

request_version.description: Version of the approval-request schema itself.

id.description: Stable identifier for this pending request.

action.description: Action name the actor is attempting.

target.description: Optional target (path, URL, etc.) the action would affect.

danger_tags.description: Danger categories the guard surfaced for this request.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why approval is needed.

expires_at.description: When the request will be auto-denied.
